name: Fin Insurance Broker Co., Ltd.
text: Took over and extended an HR platform used by 200+ people — added modules for KPI tracking, attendance, leave and OT requests, and hiring workflows, cutting down the manual back-and-forth the HR team was dealing with daily.
Moved the expense and advance payment process off paper by building a digital approval flow tied into Lark, which sped up how fast accounting could close out requests.

Designed an email classifier that mixes an ML model with rule-based logic to sort incoming issues automatically — hit 80%+ accuracy in production and made it possible to run recurring analysis on agent workload patterns.
Built out an insurance renewal system end-to-end: automated email and SMS nudges to policyholders, a call log for agents to track follow-ups, and a dashboard showing premium collection and call KPIs.

Created a back-office tool for the logistics team covering product setup, packaging configuration, order management, live stock tracking, and delivery status — one place to manage the whole fulfillment flow.

name: Freelance
text: Designed and shipped "Smart Factory," a web learning platform for factory workers — focused on making training content easy to navigate without any technical background.
Built a porter tracking app for a hospital that shows real-time staff positions on both mobile and web, helping coordinators dispatch faster and reduce idle time.
Wired a PLC-controlled sterilization system to a live web dashboard so operators could monitor temperature and pressure remotely without checking the machine in person.
Put together the frontend for an AI search tool: users ask questions in plain language, the app queries a Pinecone vector store through a Chainlit backend, and answers come back conversationally.
Pulled sensor data off factory robots via MQTT, stored and visualized it on a dashboard — early groundwork so the team could spot failure patterns before breakdowns happen.

name: Techman Electronics (Thailand) Co., Ltd.
text: Wrote control software for industrial robots and PLC systems at a manufacturing facility — handled both the logic programming and integration with the production line.
Layered IoT sensors onto existing machinery so the team could see real-time performance data; identifying failure patterns early helped bring downtime noticeably down.
